name: awaiting-collateral-exits
rationale: High-LTV intake triggers F2.AC awaiting_collateral state (per B06). Broker follows up in a subsequent event providing collateral details (specific asset offered as additional security). F2.AC should transition back to active; collateral_offered timestamp set. Tests the exit path of the state-derived gate.
notes: Two-event sequence. Intake at LTV>80% + collateral-offer follow-up. Distinguishes exit semantics from entry (B06) semantics.
